title: Richly Fried Peruvian Wagyu Skewers
description: Pungent and flaky Peruvian dish featuring Wagyu beef, this recipe is a cozy and satisfying meal option, friendly to ayurvedic-rajasic diets. It combines the richness of Wagyu with the bold flavors of Peruvian cuisine.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a blender or food processor, combine Aji amarillo pepper, garlic, and ginger, and blend until smooth.
In a large bowl, whisk together paprika, cumin, coriander, salt, and black pepper.
Add the Wagyu beef cubes to the bowl and toss to coat with the spice mixture.
Thread the coated beef cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the skewers to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes per side, or until browned.
Transfer the skewers to a baking sheet and bake for 10-12 minutes, or until cooked to desired doneness.
Brush the skewers with the Aji amarillo pepper mixture during the last 2 minutes of cooking.
Serve the skewers hot, garnished with chopped fresh cilantro and scallions.
